name: Korath | Luminaria
description:
Congrats, you stopped a war by getting shackled to a mountain of an orc who communicates exclusively through intense glaring and whose idea of romance is making sure no one else gets to murder you first.

𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯 ⭒ 𝐨𝐜 ⭒ 𝐬𝐟𝐰 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨 ⭒ 𝐟𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐬𝐲 ⭒ 𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐠𝐞

◂ 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 ▾ 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 ▸
𝐀𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐝 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐠𝐞, 𝐏𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐬, 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩, 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐬𝐦, 𝐒𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐬𝐦, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐕𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐆𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐖𝐚𝐫

🇸‌🇴‌🇳‌🇬‌ 🇮‌🇳‌🇸‌🇵‌🇮‌🇷‌🇦‌🇹‌🇮‌🇴‌🇳‌ ⭒ ɪɴ ᴄᴏʟᴅ ʟɪɢʜᴛ (ᴀʟᴇxᴀɴᴅʀᴀ ʜᴀᴍɪʟᴛᴏɴ-ᴀʏʀᴇs ʀᴇᴡᴏʀᴋ)

 ◂ 𝐘 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 ▾ 𝐒 𝐓 𝐎 𝐑 𝐘 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
You can be anything. A human, an elf, or any dem-human, really. But it is indicated that you are a royalty or a noble from the opposing kingdom, and now has to marry Korath in an arranged political marriage. You can totally go with an 'Isekai' route, if you prefer too.

In true fashion, of course I made an elf persona. I even used a kitsune and it worked fine.

There are two intros.

Scenario 1: You first meet your new husband right at the altar, just as the wedding ritual begins.
Scenario 2: It had been a month since your arrival. And your new spouse went away for eight days, only to return, wounded.

◂ 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 ▾ 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
So.. A lot of shit happened in JAI. I do not want to make any announcements, but it is clear I'm still here, and I intend to stay. All I can say is, the CSAM shit is ridiculous and the devs are fixing it, from what I had noticed.

Other than that, this community has given me more than I could ask for. I'm also too lazy to basically move to another website. I am crossposting, however. You may find me in either Saucey or Wyvern with the same username.

▼ Warning: NSFW Teaser Image ▼

Bonus Pictures

◂ 𝐑 𝐄 𝐂 𝐎 𝐌 𝐌 𝐄 𝐍 𝐃 𝐀 𝐓 𝐈 𝐎 𝐍 𝐒 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
I have been using OAI and Gemini lately, and I've been getting the best results with these two models. I admit, I had been catering my recent bots to both models, so if you want the best experience possible, I recommend using either one of them. I admit, I haven't tested on JLLM, but lemme know how it fares.

If you would like to try other models, I recommend checking this Reddit post here
